ops.body:
2026-07-19 CAMPAIGN COMPLETE — demo bar met and closed. 2 experiments proposed → validated → preflighted → run → retro'd under the gated policy; boundary-halted ("campaign complete: 2 experiments run") + stop.json latched. Spend: $3.18 athome-metered (proposals/driver/retros); true metric spend = 4 score-watcher invocations (exp1 baseline+candidate, exp3 baseline+candidate; the failed preflight cost $0), est. ~$16-30 vs the operator's raised ~$45 envelope.

MACHINERY EXERCISED (the demo's real payload): 2 operator rejections with feedback (6-unit spend shape → the proposer complied in two steps); the rejections-count-as-failures streak halt (correct-but-surprising: forced a fresh root + the structural fix 382b252e pinning ceilings.max_units=1); preflight baseline scored outside max_units; honest-negative completion (exp1: rank64 0.9317 vs baseline 0.9326 → DISCARD); the zero-kept retro wedge → fixed in athome (2ead9f47 + 74cfce51, NegativeRetro path) and the wedged retro regenerated via reconcile_retros; launched-spec replay refusal on crash-debris queue file (cleaned); exp2 preflight-failed in 0.6s on harness dep skew (operator's cc-transcript 14 migration vs the campaign venv — worktree reverted to 36ca84a5; slot NOT consumed, exactly the P1 semantics); exp3 (same hypothesis re-proposed) completed KEEP 0.9191 vs its own baseline 0.9180.

INSTRUMENT FINDING (per the operator steer "evaluate the score/effort fn as much as the model"): identical spec_digest 064fc59f baselines — same recipe, commit 36ca84a5, seed 1729 — scored 0.9326 (morning) vs 0.9180 (afternoon): a between-run band of 0.0146, ~13x BOTH verdict margins (−0.0009, +0.0011). Neither campaign verdict is signal; the kept branch (athome/003-..., commit 2320ff39) is NOT to be adopted as an improvement. The exp3 retro's own next_steps independently recommend repeat-trials to estimate metric noise. Follow-ups recorded: noise-floor measurement is a prerequisite for future campaign verdicts and for the E14 futility rule (comment on 41f08fd8); score-watcher should durably journal per-invocation measured spend (today it evaporates with the archive checkout); preflight failures should surface the scorer log tail (papercut filed).

Artifacts: ~/.athome/research/meta-p6/{ledger.jsonl (full chronology), retros.jsonl (2: one NegativeRetro, one kept-flat)}, per-experiment journals + frozen baselines in cc-steer .git/athome/, campaign worktree removed after close.
